name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: ''

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you'd like. Include API shape if relevant.

## DDD considerations

- Which bounded context does this belong to (action modeling / composition / execution)?
- Does it require new aggregates, value objects, or port interfaces?
- Does it preserve the dependency direction (domain has no outward deps)?

## Alternatives

What alternatives did you consider?

## Additional context

Any other relevant information.
